mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (user_id, book_id, borrow_time, `status`) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, NULL AS username, r.book_id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, r.borrow_time AS borrowTime, r.return_time AS returnTime, r.`status` AS status FROM borrow_record r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.borrow_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, u.username, r.book_id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, r.borrow_time AS borrowTime, r.return_time AS returnTime, r.`status` AS status FROM borrow_record r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id ORDER BY r.borrow_time DESC
